plugins.name: plan-review-loop
plugins.description: Closed-loop Codex review on ExitPlanMode. Denies plan exit on P0/P1 findings; loop closes when the plan is clean.

plugins.name: bash-guard
plugins.description: PreToolUse(Bash) hook that evaluates every shell command against a configurable rule set. Blocks destructive git ops, filesystem-nuking commands, untrusted curl-pipe-to-shell patterns, and identity-management changes. Rules are user-editable.
